description: The SingleShapeCharacterControllerManager component is used by locomotions to change the shape of a Capsule Collider based on a user's standing height and current height.

fields.UseUserHeadHeightWhenAvailable: Whether to use the user's head height to do calculations when possible.
fields.HeadHeightOffset: How much to add/subtract from the user's head to make the top of the capsule.
fields.CrouchTargetWidth: How wide the capsule should become when crouching.
fields.CrouchStart: The maximum height the user's head has to be for them to be crouching.
fields.CrouchEnd: The minimum height the user's head has to be for them to be crouching.
fields.RootAtBottom: Whether the bottom end of the capsule should be at the slot rather than the slot being at the middle.
fields.TargetHeight: The slot to drive to influence the capsule collider's height.
fields.TargetWidth: The slot to drive to influence the capsule collider's radius.
fields.TargetOffset: The slot to drive to influence the capsule collider's center offset.
